formula: Pr_{LOS} = \begin{cases} 1 & d_{2D-out} \le 18m \\ \left[\dfrac{18}{d_{2D-out}} + \exp\left(-\dfrac{d_{2D-out}}{63}\right)\left(1-\dfrac{18}{d_{2D-out}}\right)\right]\left(1 + C'(h_{UT})\dfrac{5}{4}\left(\dfrac{d_{2D-out}}{100}\right)^3 \exp\left(-\dfrac{d_{2D-out}}{150}\right)\right) & 18m < d_{2D-out} \end{cases}; \quad C'(h_{UT}) = \begin{cases} 0 & h_{UT} \le 13m \\ \left(\dfrac{h_{UT}-13}{10}\right)^{1.5} & 13m < h_{UT} \le 23m \end{cases}

Pr_{LOS,subsce}(d_{2D}) = \exp\left(-\dfrac{d_{2D}}{k_{subsce}}\right); \quad k_{subsce} = \begin{cases} -\dfrac{d_{clutter}}{\ln(1-r)} & \text{for InF-SL and InF-DL} \\ -\dfrac{d_{clutter}}{\ln(1-r)}\cdot\dfrac{h_{BS}-h_{UT}}{h_c-h_{UT}} & \text{for InF-SH and InF-DH} \end{cases}
notes: Parameters d_clutter, r, h_c defined in Table 7.2-4

formula: P_{LOS} = \begin{cases} 1 & d_{2D-out} \le 10m \\ \exp\left(-\dfrac{d_{2D-out}}{k_{commercial}}\right)\exp\left(-\dfrac{d_{2D-out}}{k_{residential}}\right)\exp\left(-\dfrac{d_{2D-out}}{k_{vegetation}}\right) & d_{2D-out} > 10m \end{cases}; \quad \dfrac{1}{k_{commercial}} = -\dfrac{\ln(1-r_{commercial})}{d_{clutter}}\cdot\dfrac{h_{commercial}-h_{UT}}{h_{BS}-h_{UT}}; \quad \dfrac{1}{k_{residential}} = -\dfrac{\ln(1-r_{residential})}{d_{clutter}}\cdot\dfrac{\max(h_{residential}-h_{UT},0)}{h_{BS}-h_{UT}}; \quad \dfrac{1}{k_{vegetation}} = -\dfrac{\ln(1-r_{vegetation})}{d_{clutter}}\cdot\dfrac{h_{vegetation}-h_{UT}}{h_{BS}-h_{UT}}; \quad d_{clutter}=30m, h_{commercial}=20m, h_{residential}=8m, h_{vegetation}=15m, r_{commercial}=2\%, r_{residential}=18\%, r_{vegetation}=0\%/10\%/20\%
notes: r_vegetation: 0% no vegetation, 10% sparse vegetation, 20% dense vegetation
